title: chrysopogon distichophyllus
intro: Chrysopogon distichophyllus, also known as Vetyver or Khas or Khas-khas, is a type of grass native to India and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chrysopogon distichophyllus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural insect repellent. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant are typically used to make essential oils, powders, and extracts, which can be used in aromatherapy, perfumery, and traditional medicine.
